bugs.error_message: Context menu loses focus / disappears while user is interacting with it
bugs.root_cause: 10-second timer fires Update-Tray which swaps ContextMenuStrip with a new object; if the menu is open, the old object is disposed and focus is lost
bugs.fix: Added Visible check before menu rebuild: if ContextMenuStrip.Visible is true, return early (skip swap). Icon and tooltip are still updated on every tick.
